mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0505_01-01#Sql001 */ COR_LEC_ID AS lectureId, COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE AS yearMonth, COR_TITLE AS title, COR_BRIEF AS overview, COR_FILE_NAME1 AS fileName1, COR_FILE_NAME2 AS fileName2, COR_FILE_NAME3 AS fileName3, COR_FILE_DESC1 AS fileComment1, COR_FILE_DESC2 AS fileComment2, COR_FILE_DESC3 AS fileComment3, COR_CONTENTS AS contents, COR_HONBAN_FLG disclosureFlag, COR_CONTENTS_FILE_NAME contentsFileName, lastUpdateDate FROM ( SELECT COR_LEC_ID, COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE, COR_TITLE, COR_BRIEF, COR_FILE_NAME1, COR_FILE_NAME2, COR_FILE_NAME3, COR_FILE_DESC1, COR_FILE_DESC2, COR_FILE_DESC3, COR_CONTENTS, COR_HONBAN_FLG, COR_CONTENTS_FILE_NAME, NVL2(COR_UPDATE_DATE,COR_UPDATE_DATE,COR_CREATE_DATE) AS lastUpdateDate FROM COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION ) ORDER BY COR_COMMUNICATION_DATE DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0505_01-01#Sql002 */ COR_COMPLIANCE_COMMUNICATION SET COR_HONBAN_FLG = #{req.disclosureFlag}, COR_UPDATE_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, COR_UPDATE_BY = #{req.updater} WHERE COR_LEC_ID = #{req.lectureId}
